{% extends "layouts/admin.html" %} {% block title %}Vendor Quote Detail - Admin{% endblock %} {% block content %} {% set user_permissions = current_user.permissions if current_user is defined and current_user else [] %} {% set user_roles = current_user.roles if current_user is defined and current_user else [] %} {% set user_roles_lower = user_roles | map('lower') | list %} {% set can_review_quote = 'admin' in user_roles_lower or 'vendors:quotes:update' in user_permissions %} {% set quote_status = quote.status.value if quote.status else '' %}

{% elif quote_action == "commented" %}

{% elif quote_action == "rejected" %}

{% endif %}

{{ quote.total }}

Review Outcome

{% endif %}

Quote Comments

{% for comment in quote_comments %}
{{ comment.action or 'comment' }}{% if comment.author %} • {{ comment.author }}{% endif %}{% if comment.created_at %} • {{ comment.created_at }}{% endif %}
{{ comment.body or '—' }}
{% if comment.attachments %}
Attachments
    {% for attachment in comment.attachments %} {% set href = attachment.url %} {% if attachment.key %} {% set href = '/admin/storage/dotmac-uploads/' ~ attachment.key %} {% elif href and href is string and 'localhost:9000/' in href and '/dotmac-uploads/' in href %} {% set href = '/admin/storage/dotmac-uploads/' ~ href.split('/dotmac-uploads/', 1)[1] %} {% endif %}
  • {{ attachment.file_name or 'Attachment' }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if (comment.action or 'comment') == 'comment' %}

{% endif %}
{% else %}

{% endfor %}

Revision #{{ rev.revision_number }}

{% endfor %}
